title: Buckets Reshaped
description: Makes the Minecraft buckets look cooler
body:
![Buckets Reshaped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e40a6def1c32b86ba9b1370ec7bc1ff037dd571_0.webp)

![Preview of Buckets Reshaped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1758d88c21f6382ba3129adcb4b1e9ebfb3a2951.png)


This resource pack reshapes the outdated bucket textures without destroying the vanilla feel.

 

WITH ADDED MOD SUPPORT (starting v.1.1.0)! See mods below:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


Create
Create: Dragons Plus
Create: Enchantment Industry
Create Aeronautics
Starcatcher

</details>
